name: India SMB Lead Intelligence - All Leads, Tagged v5

parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT lead_id FROM leads WHERE place_id='{{ $json.place_id }}' LIMIT 1) AS lead_id;

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all();
return $input.all();

const items = $input.all();
return items.map((item, index) => {
  const lead = $('Code - Assemble Enrichment').all()[index].json;
  let raw = item.json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || '{}';
  raw = raw.replace(/```json/g,'').replace(/```/g,'').trim();
  const s = raw.indexOf('{'); const e = raw.lastIndexOf('}');
  if (s >= 0 && e > s) raw = raw.substring(s, e+1);
  let ai = {};
  try { ai = JSON.parse(raw); } catch(err) {
    ai = {
      score: 5, grade: 'Warm',
      needs_website: !lead.has_website, needs_social_media: true,
      needs_software: false, needs_marketing: true,
      business_stage: 'Unknown',
      best_contact_method: lead.has_whatsapp ? 'WhatsApp' : 'Call',
      whatsapp_message: 'Namaste! Aapka ' + lead.name + ' business dekha — kya digital growth mein interested hain?',
      email_subject: 'Quick question for ' + lead.name,
      recommended_service: 'Digital Marketing',
      follow_up_days: 3, reason: 'Default fallback'
    };
  }
  const score = Math.min(10, Math.max(1, parseInt(ai.score) || 5));
  return {
    json: {
      lead_id:           lead.lead_id,
      place_id:          lead.place_id,
      name:              lead.name,
      category:          lead.category,
      niche:             lead.niche,
      city:              lead.city,
      phone:             lead.best_phone,
      phone_intl:        lead.phone_intl,
      whatsapp_number:   lead.whatsapp_number,
      whatsapp_link:     lead.whatsapp_link,
      email:             lead.best_email,
      contact_name:      lead.contact_name,
      contact_title:     lead.contact_title,
      all_emails:        lead.all_emails,
      address:           lead.full_address,
      lat:               lead.lat,
      lng:               lead.lng,
      google_maps_url:   lead.google_maps_url,
      website:           lead.website,
      rating:            lead.rating,
      total_ratings:     lead.total_ratings,
      opening_hours:     lead.opening_hours,
      business_status:   lead.business_status,
      website_description: lead.website_description,
      has_website:       lead.has_website,
      has_phone:         lead.has_phone,
      has_email:         lead.has_email,
      has_whatsapp:      lead.has_whatsapp,
      ai_score:          score,
      ai_grade:          score>=7?'Hot':score>=4?'Warm':'Cold',
      ai_needs_website:  ai.needs_website      === true,
      ai_needs_social:   ai.needs_social_media === true,
      ai_needs_software:  ai.needs_software     === true,
      ai_needs_marketing: ai.needs_marketing    === true,
      ai_business_stage: ai.business_stage     || 'Unknown',
      ai_best_contact:   ai.best_contact_method|| 'WhatsApp',
      ai_whatsapp_message: ai.whatsapp_message   || '',
      ai_email_subject:  ai.email_subject      || '',
      ai_recommended_service: ai.recommended_service|| '',
      ai_reason:         ai.reason             || '',
      next_followup:     new Date(Date.now()+(parseInt(ai.follow_up_days)||3)*86400000).toISOString().split('T')[0],
      status:            'New',
      source:            'Google Maps',
      timestamp:         lead.timestamp || new Date().toISOString()
    }
  };
});

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, leadId: $('Parse - Final Lead').item.json.lead_id, score: $('Parse - Final Lead').item.json.ai_score, grade: $('Parse - Final Lead').item.json.ai_grade, name: $('Parse - Final Lead').item.json.name, phone: $('Parse - Final Lead').item.json.phone, whatsapp: $('Parse - Final Lead').item.json.whatsapp_link }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT name, phone, whatsapp_link, email, city, category, ai_score, ai_grade, ai_whatsapp_message, ai_recommended_service, next_followup, status FROM leads WHERE next_followup = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND status NOT IN ('Closed','Converted') ORDER BY ai_score DESC LIMIT 20;

parameters.text:
=✅ *No follow-ups today.*
POST /find-leads with niche + city to find new leads.

parameters.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ai_grade='Hot')  AS hot,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ai_grade='Warm') AS warm,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ai_grade='Cold') AS cold,
  ROUND(AVG(ai_score)::numeric,1)          AS avg_score,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS new_this_week,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_phone=true)   AS with_phone,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_email=true)   AS with_email,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_website=false) AS no_website,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='Converted') AS converted,
  MODE() WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY city)  AS top_city,
  MODE() WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY niche) AS top_niche
FROM leads;
SELECT (SELECT lead_id FROM leads WHERE place_id='{{ $json.place_id }}' LIMIT 1) AS lead_id;

      ai_whatsapp_message: ai.whatsapp_message   || '',
      ai_email_subject:  ai.email_subject      || '',
      ai_recommended_service: ai.recommended_service|| '',

      status:            'New',
      source:            'Google Maps',
      timestamp:         lead.timestamp || new Date().toISOString()
    }
  };
});
